# Jordon — AI Chatbots & Voice Agents for Every Business

> Jordon deploys AI chatbots and voice agents for Indian businesses. Our AI handles customer calls, website chats, and WhatsApp conversations — answering queries, capturing leads, booking appointments, and more. 10+ Indian languages. 10x cheaper than human teams.

## Company Info

- Website: https://jordon.ai
- Location: Based in Hyderabad, serving all of India
- Founder: Tharun Josh (https://linkedin.com/in/tharunjosh)
- Contact: tharunkmr3@gmail.com
- Booking: https://calendly.com/tharunkmr3/30min

## What We Do

AI chatbots and voice agents that handle real conversations across every channel — voice calls, website chat, and WhatsApp.

### Channels
- **Voice AI Agents** — Handle inbound and outbound phone calls with natural conversation
- **Website Chatbots** — Embed AI chat on your website for instant customer support
- **WhatsApp Bots** — Automated conversations on WhatsApp for support, sales, and updates

### Key Capabilities
1. **Voice AI Agents** — AI answers customer calls, resolves queries from your knowledge base, transfers to human when needed
2. **Website & WhatsApp Chatbots** — Embed AI on your website or WhatsApp. Answer questions 24/7, collect leads, hand off to your team
3. **Lead Capture & Qualification** — AI calls or chats with new leads, collects requirements, qualifies opportunities, books meetings
4. **Multilingual Support** — English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Malayalam, Punjabi
5. **Knowledge Base Powered** — Trained on your products, policies, and FAQs. Works across all channels from one knowledge base.
6. **Smart Escalation** — Seamless transfer to your team with full context when AI can't answer — on any channel
7. **Always On, Every Channel** — 24/7/365, unlimited concurrent conversations, zero attrition

## Use Cases

- **Customer Support** (Voice + Chat): Answer product questions, track orders, handle returns — via calls, website chat, or WhatsApp
- **Sales & Lead Capture** (Voice + WhatsApp): Call or chat with leads within seconds, qualify, book sales meetings
- **HR & Internal Helpdesk** (Chatbot): Employees ask about leave, reimbursements, policies via chat or voice
- **Manufacturing & B2B** (Voice + WhatsApp): Dealer inquiries, order status, dispatch schedules in local languages
- **Healthcare & Clinics** (Voice + Chat): Appointment booking, insurance queries, lab report status
- **E-commerce & D2C** (All Channels): "Where is my order" on WhatsApp, post-purchase support via chat, returns via voice

## Pricing

### Starter — ₹15,000/month
- Up to 500 conversations/month
- 1 AI agent (voice or chatbot)
- Knowledge base setup
- English + 2 Indian languages
- Human escalation
- Email support

### Growth — ₹35,000/month
- Up to 2,000 conversations/month
- Voice + chatbot + WhatsApp
- Knowledge base + ongoing updates
- All Indian languages
- Lead capture & meeting booking
- Analytics dashboard
- Priority support

### Enterprise — Custom pricing
- Contact us for high-volume needs

## AI Agents vs Human Teams

| Metric | Human Team | AI Agents |
|--------|-----------|-----------|
| Monthly cost | ₹20,000-40,000 per person | ₹15,000 (unlimited agents) |
| Availability | 8-10 hours/day | 24/7/365 |
| Channels | Phone only | Voice + Chat + WhatsApp |
| Languages | 1-2 | 10+ |
| Concurrent conversations | 1 per person | Unlimited |
| Training time | 2-4 weeks | 48 hours |
| Attrition | 30-40% annually | Zero |

## Setup

- Timeline: 48 hours from knowledge base submission
- Process: Share FAQs/docs → We configure & test → Go live on all channels → Continuous improvement
- We handle all setup, deployment, and ongoing knowledge base management

## FAQ

Q: What channels do you support?
A: Voice calls (inbound & outbound), website chatbots, and WhatsApp bots — all from one platform, one knowledge base.

Q: Which languages are supported?
A: English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Malayalam, and Punjabi — across voice and chat.

Q: How long does setup take?
A: 48 hours from when you share your knowledge base materials.

Q: Can the AI book meetings, send emails, and follow up?
A: Yes. Across voice, chat, and WhatsApp — it collects requirements, checks availability, books meetings, and sends confirmations.

Q: Is this just a basic chatbot?
A: No. Our AI agents have real conversations — on calls they sound human, on chat they understand context. Not scripted IVR or keyword bots.

Q: Can we use it for internal teams?
A: Yes. Deploy chatbots for HR queries, IT helpdesk, or any internal knowledge base — on WhatsApp or your internal portal.

Q: What happens when the AI can't answer?
A: Transfers to your team with full context — what was discussed, customer details, and why it's escalating. Works across all channels.
